description: Baidu Phase 6: h2_end_stream=2 + h2_hold_request=1. DB changes: h2_end_stream 1->2 (delayed END_STREAM), h2_hold_request 0->1. Previous #489 FAIL: onclose+AbortError when stream closes. Delayed END_STREAM may let browser process SSE data before close event fires.
steps: 3. DevTools F12 -> Network (Preserve log ON) + Console
5. 스크린샷: 전체 UI + Network EventStream + Console
notes: h2_end_stream=2 + h2_hold_request=1 최초 시도. #489에서 onclose+AbortError 발생 — delayed END_STREAM으로 해결 가능성 테스트.
